problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: Combining Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
